Our story

A cozy, family-run coffee shop in the heart of Westbrook, Connecticut — where every cup feels like home.

A hidden gem in Westbrook

Julie's Cup of Joe is dedicated to giving every customer a personalized, community-driven experience. Whether it's your first visit or your hundredth, you'll always feel welcome here. We make our syrups by hand, bake fresh daily, and love showcasing the talent of local artists in our gift shop.

Made with love

Every syrup is homemade in-house. We craft flavors you can't find anywhere else.

Community first

We showcase local artists and carry locally made gifts — supporting neighbors is who we are.

A place to belong

Quick coffee or a long afternoon — you're always welcome at Julie's.

Come visit us
